Myles Hightower was a knight from House Hightower during the reign of King Aegon III Targaryen.[1]

History[ ]

Ser Myles grew furious when his cousin, Lord Lyonel Hightower, agreed to Lord Corlys Velaryon's terms to end the Dance of the Dragons, including returning the Crown's gold, as Myles had stolen a good part of it.[1]
